_comment: The generic gym-leader challenge intro — plays when a QUALIFIED challenger clicks Challenge on any leader whose character carries battle.intro_scene. facingFrame: keyframes are offsets in the challenger's LOOK frame (x=right, y=up, z=forward; yaw/pitch are offsets), so the one scene works at every arena orientation: the camera pulls up over the challenger's shoulder framing the leader, sweeps right for a side profile of the standoff, crosses high over the leader looking back down the arena, then drops home. endBack 7 restores the challenger SEVEN BLOCKS BACK from where they clicked (still facing the leader) — the stage-back — and the play command's end-chain then fires the engage function that opens the actual battle from there. Skippable: a skip still stages back + starts the fight.
